texto: The more deference there is, the narrower the band of judgements on which organisations rely. Deference acts like the fatty deposits that build up in arteries, restricting the flow of fresh, oxygen-enriched blood across the system.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robin Ryde: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sucesso. O trecho “The more deference there is, the narrower the band of judgements on which organisations rely. Def…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, business, business-success pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de business-success.
